test-case.name: LaunchTestWithEnumeratorPasses

failure.message: Unhandled log message: '[Exception] ArgumentException: Append access can be requested only in write-only mode.'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

Could not find a device that supports eye tracking on Awake. Gaze Interactor (UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.Samples.StarterAssets.GazeInputManager) has subscribed to device connected events and will activate the GameObject when an eye tracking device is connected. Scenario files used in the scene SampleScene and added to the build: Assets/Oracle_InObjectScene.xml Assets/Oracle_Colission.xml Assets/Oracle_MoveObjectToOrigin.xml Assets/Oracle_Teleportation.xml Assets/Oracle_OutSceneTeleportation.xml Assets/Oracle_Selection.xml Mesh 'Plane' has more materials (2) than submeshes (1) 🚀 Initialisation of the test suite 📢 StartNextChild() called - Actual Index : 0 No Camera Floor Offset GameObject specified for XR Origin, using attached GameObject. ▶ Activation of ScanInteractableObject 🎬 ScanInteractableObject initialised ! ➡ ScanInteractableObject begins his interaction ! Total Interactable objects in scene: 16 The game_logs.txt file has been cleared. Sphere Interactable: (3.25, 2.81, 0.50) Blaster: (2.61, 0.95, -0.16) Arch_Interactable: (2.49, 0.71, -2.13) Spatial Panel Manipulator Model: (0.44, 0.93, -1.83) Spatial Panel Manipulator UI Examples: (-0.45, 0.93, -2.35) Torus Interactable: (2.51, 1.19, -2.98) Tapered Interactable: (2.50, 1.60, -2.98) Tapered Interactable: (2.51, 0.99, -2.98) Cylinder Interactable: (2.15, 1.16, -2.98) Cube Interactable: (2.51, 1.40, -2.98) Gaze Interactor not set or missing on ScanInteractableObject (UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.Gaze.XRGazeAssistance). Disabling this XR Gaze Assistance component. Hand Tracking Subsystem not found or not running, can't subscribe to hand tracking status. Enable that feature in the OpenXR project settings and ensure OpenXR is enabled as the plug-in provider. This component will reattempt getting a reference to the subsystem each frame.
